proposed.title: Dak Art OFF à Saint Louis
proposed.summary: The Dak Art OFF event in Saint Louis features a presentation of universal expressions at the CRDS Museum. Aminata S. Gassama's work on immigration irregularity is showcased through her paintings.

proposed.title: Dak Art 2024/OFF
proposed.summary: The Dak Art event in Louga features a reaction from Mme Gnagna Diallo, the Director of the Regional Cultural Center of Louga.

proposed.title: In Minor Keys
proposed.summary: The 61st International Art Exhibition of La Biennale di Venezia – titled In Minor Keys by Koyo Kouoh – runs from Saturday 9 May to Sunday 22 November 2026 at the Giardini and Arsenale venues, in various locations across Venice and at Forte Marghera. With the full support of Koyo Kouoh’s family, La Biennale di Venezia decided to carry out her Exhibition. It will do so by following the project just as she conceived and defined it, with the purpose of preserving, enhancing and disseminating her ideas and the work she pursued.

proposed.title: BAB Academy x BACC TAM #6 Public Lecture
proposed.summary: The event featured inspiring artists discussing sustainability and community themes in their work.

proposed.title: Behind the scenes of transforming the BACC for BAB 2024 'Nurture Gaia'
proposed.summary: The installation of a massive wall wrap was showcased to set the stage for an exciting season of contemporary art in the city.

proposed.title: Press Conference at Bangkok Art Biennale 2024
proposed.summary: The event featured a group of inspiring artists discussing sustainability and community themes in their work.

proposed.title: Blankets and Wine announces 2026 Nairobi season with three festival dates
proposed.summary: The 2026 Blankets and Wine festival in Nairobi will feature performances by Kenyan artists Labdi, Mordecai (Dexx), Mejja, Serro, Mutoriah, Watendawili, alongside Nigerian singer Fave. The event spans genres such as Afro-fusion, Genge, and Afrobeats.

proposed.title: Beneath the Baobabs Festival
proposed.summary: A vibrant celebration of music, culture, and connection under ancient trees and open skies. The festival blends electronic music, live performances, art, and wellness experiences, offering a unique escape that connects global audiences through culture, nature, and community in Kilifi.

proposed.title: Lamu Yoga & Wellness Festival
proposed.summary: An immersive five-day transformative experience of yoga, personal development, breathwork, dance, meditation, and sound healing. Over 150 classes led by over 30 teachers.

proposed.title: Wakaliwood Edition — Action-Packed Festival Adrift Overland Camp
proposed.summary: Get Early Access Join The Gathering Priority tickets, exclusive drops, and curated benefits. Email * Country Secure Your Spot No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Powered by Nyege Nyege Festival 2026 · November 19-22, 2026 · Adrift Overland Camp · Jinja, Uganda · Kalagala Falls, River Nile More Than a Festival What Awaits You VIBES PAKA LAST Across 7 stages, Nyege Nyege opens a portal into the diversity of afrocentric music and beyond. From traditional music to electronic outliers, from singeli to afrobeats, the vibes are non stop. NILE ADVENTURES White water rafting, bungee jumping, and sunset cruises on the mighty River Nile MORE THAN MUSIC Immersive art installations, workshops, talks, film screenings, fashion showcases, magic shows and more WORLD-CLASS CAMPING Riverside camping at Adrift Overland Camp, right on the festival site What is Nyege Nyege? AFRICA'S MOST ADVENTUROUS FESTIVAL Born on the banks of the Nile in 2015, Nyege Nyege grew from an underground gathering into a defining platform for contemporary music and art, Ugandan at heart, Pan African in spirit. Set against the raw landscape of Kalagala Falls, the adventure unfolds over four days of continuous sound, radical expression, and total immersion. More than a music festival, we're a living ecosystem where fashion, film, performance and music converge into one expansive collective celebration of cultures. For its 11th edition, Nyege Nyege mutates into a Wakaliwood-inspired film set, the script will unfold in the months to come.
